queries.sql:
SELECT groupArray(CAST((user, user) AS Tuple(value String, label String))) AS user
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT user FROM system.query_log WHERE user != '' ORDER BY user)

spec.name: Filter · Users
spec.description: Curated Dashboard Filter source (Array(Tuple(value, label)) shape): every distinct user seen in system.query_log, as a searchable single-select. Upgrades any Panel's {user:String} parameter from a plain text box to this dropdown.

queries.sql:
SELECT CAST(map(
  'Select', 'SELECT queries',
  'Insert', 'INSERT queries',
  'Show', 'SHOW / metadata queries',
  'Explain', 'EXPLAIN queries',
  'Describe', 'DESCRIBE queries',
  'KillQuery', 'KILL QUERY commands'
) AS Map(String, String)) AS kind

spec.name: Filter · Query kind
spec.description: Curated Dashboard Filter source (Map(String, String) shape): a fixed map of real query_kind values to human-friendly labels. Upgrades any Panel's {kind:String} parameter to this dropdown — the label is shown, the map's key (the real query_kind) is what's bound to the parameter.

queries.sql:
SELECT groupArray(toString(exception_code)) AS errcode
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT exception_code FROM system.query_log WHERE exception_code != 0 ORDER BY exception_code)

spec.name: Filter · Exception codes
spec.description: Curated Dashboard Filter source (plain Array(T) shape — value and label are the same string): every distinct ClickHouse exception code actually seen in this cluster's query_log. Upgrades any Panel's {errcode:String} parameter to this dropdown.

queries.sql:
SELECT
  count() AS total_queries,
  countIf(exception_code != 0) AS errors,
  round(100 * countIf(exception_code != 0) / count(), 2) AS error_rate_pct,
  round(avg(query_duration_ms), 1) AS avg_duration_ms,
  round(quantile(0.99)(query_duration_ms), 1) AS p99_duration_ms,
  uniqExact(user) AS active_users
FROM system.query_log
WHERE type IN ('QueryFinish', 'ExceptionWhileProcessing') AND query_kind = 'Select'
/*[ AND event_time >= now() - toIntervalHour({hours:UInt32}) ]*/

spec.name: Query log health (KPI)
spec.description: Top-line SELECT-query health for this cluster: volume, error rate, and latency. {hours:UInt32} is an AUTO filter — a plain optional numeric field with no Filter source; blank means "all time" (this cluster's whole query_log history), filled in narrows the window. Every other Panel below that also declares {hours:UInt32} shares this exact same field.

spec.name: About this demo
spec.description: Static Text panel explaining the dashboard.

cfg.content:
# Dashboard Filter sources demo

Every favorite below is a Panel, except three **Filter**-role sources (#160) that populate the filter bar above with option lists queried live from `system.query_log` on the **otel** demo cluster.

**Auto filters** — plain, type-detected controls with no Filter source:

- `hours` — optional lookback window in hours; blank means all time
- `minDurationMs` — optional minimum query-duration threshold, in ms
- `namePattern` — optional case-insensitive substring search over the query text

**Curated filters** — sourced from a favorited Filter-role query, one per option shape:

- `user` — real ClickHouse users, from an `Array(Tuple(value, label))` source
- `kind` — friendly query-kind labels, from a `Map(String, String)` source
- `errcode` — exception codes actually seen on this cluster, from a plain `Array(String)` source

Analytical panels are adapted from the Altinity KB page ["Handy queries for system.query_log"](https://kb.altinity.com/altinity-kb-useful-queries/query_log/).

queries.sql:
SELECT
  event_time,
  user,
  round(query_duration_ms) AS duration_ms,
  formatReadableSize(memory_usage) AS memory,
  read_rows,
  substring(query, 1, 100) AS query_preview
FROM system.query_log
WHERE type = 'QueryFinish' AND query_kind = 'Select'
/*[ AND user = {user:String} ]*/
/*[ AND query_duration_ms >= {minDurationMs:UInt32} ]*/
/*[ AND positionCaseInsensitive(query, {namePattern:String}) > 0 ]*/
ORDER BY query_duration_ms DESC
LIMIT 50

spec.name: Slowest SELECT queries
spec.description: Adapted from the Altinity KB's "Most resource-intensive queries" — the highest-latency completed SELECTs, with duration/memory/rows-read to spot what's actually expensive. Demonstrates three filters together: the CURATED {user:String} dropdown (Filter · Users) plus two AUTO fields, {minDurationMs:UInt32} (numeric threshold) and {namePattern:String} (free-text substring search) — all three optional.

queries.sql:
SELECT arrayJoin(columns) AS column, count() AS hits
FROM system.query_log
WHERE type = 'QueryFinish'
/*[ AND query_kind = {kind:String} ]*/
  AND notEmpty(columns)
GROUP BY column
ORDER BY hits DESC
LIMIT 20

spec.name: Most-selected columns
spec.description: Adapted from the Altinity KB's "Most-selected columns" — which columns have been referenced most often. Demonstrates the CURATED {kind:String} dropdown (Filter · Query kind, Map-shaped): blank shows every query kind's columns, choosing a kind narrows to it.

queries.sql:
SELECT arrayJoin(used_functions) AS function, count() AS hits
FROM system.query_log
WHERE type = 'QueryFinish'
/*[ AND event_time >= now() - toIntervalHour({hours:UInt32}) ]*/
  AND notEmpty(used_functions)
GROUP BY function
ORDER BY hits DESC
LIMIT 20

spec.name: Most-used functions
spec.description: Adapted from the Altinity KB's "Most-used functions" — which SQL functions appear most often across executed queries. Reuses the same AUTO {hours:UInt32} field as the KPI panel above (one field, shared by every Panel that declares it).

queries.sql:
SELECT toDate(event_time) AS day, count() AS errors
FROM system.query_log
WHERE exception_code != 0
/*[ AND toString(exception_code) = {errcode:String} ]*/
GROUP BY day
ORDER BY day

spec.name: Errors over time
spec.description: Daily count of failed queries (any exception_code != 0). Demonstrates the CURATED {errcode:String} dropdown (Filter · Exception codes, plain Array(T) shape — value and label are identical): blank shows every error, choosing a code narrows the trend to just that failure.

queries.sql:
SELECT
  event_time,
  multiIf(exception_code != 0, 'error', query_duration_ms > 1000, 'warn', 'info') AS level,
  if(exception_code != 0, exception, query) AS message,
  user,
  query_kind,
  query_duration_ms,
  formatReadableSize(memory_usage) AS memory
FROM system.query_log
WHERE type IN ('QueryFinish', 'ExceptionWhileProcessing')
  AND query_kind NOT IN ('Insert', 'AsyncInsertFlush')
/*[ AND event_time >= now() - toIntervalHour({hours:UInt32}) ]*/
/*[ AND user = {user:String} ]*/
ORDER BY event_time DESC
LIMIT 300

spec.name: Recent query activity (log)
spec.description: Raw query_log rows as a Logs view, level-colored by outcome (error/slow/info) and excluding the noisy internal Insert/AsyncInsertFlush firehose so the feed reads as actual query activity. Reuses BOTH the AUTO {hours:UInt32} field and the CURATED {user:String} dropdown from the panels above.
